title: Charm Air Freshener Spray Lavender Pack of 12 x 240ml | Long lasting Room Spray | Fresh Lavender Scent for Home, Office, Bathroom & Living Spaces
features: LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS – Continuous lavender scent eliminates odors for hours. ELIMINATES TOUGH ODORS – Neutralizes smells from pets, cooking, smoke, and bathrooms. CALMING LAVENDER SCENT – Premium fragrance promotes relaxation and reduces stress. VERSATILE USE – For home, office, bathroom, kitchen, car, and pet areas. GREAT VALUE PACK – 12 full-size 240ml cans for whole-home freshness. EASY & INSTANT – No plugs or wait time. Just shake and spray.
description: Elevate the ambiance of your home or workspace with Charm Air Freshener Spray Lavender. This pack of 12 bottles, each with 240ml of spray, provides a long-lasting, refreshing lavender scent that quickly neutralizes and eliminates unpleasant odors. Perfect for use in living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, offices, and any space that needs a fresh, calming fragrance. The easy-to-use spray ensures even coverage and a clean, inviting atmosphere. Enjoy the soothing benefits of fresh lavender and keep your environment smelling naturally delightful all day long.
